questions.question: Describe the main difference between a Deterministic Finite Automaton (DFA) and a Nondeterministic Finite Automaton (NFA) in terms of the number of possible paths it can take to accept a string.
Design a DFA to recognize the pattern 'abba' in a given string. Draw a diagram to illustrate your solution.

Explain how to modify a DFA to handle epsilon-transitions, and provide an example of a pattern recognition problem that can be solved using a DFA with epsilon-transitions. Be sure to include the modified DFA diagram.
